result.summary: Wrote requirements spec (no build) for the self-learning learning-sweep guardrail: 4 triggers (milestone/correction/pre-compaction/session-end mapped to Stop/PreCompact/SessionEnd/SessionStart hook events), 5-step sweep procedure (capture->filter->classify+route->persist->litmus-verify), persistence routing (auto-memory/backlog/brains), 8 testable ACs (AC1 = correction => persisted artifact before session-end), NFRs (anti-nag dominant), and 5 open PO decisions led by hook-enforced-vs-skill-discipline (recommended: hybrid skill + narrow fails-closed Stop/PreCompact hook).
